triples.subject: Electric Vehicle (EV) market
triples.sentence: The Electric Vehicle (EV) market is expected to really take off in 2022, driven by innovation in battery manufacturing.

triples.subject: 6.3M vehicles
triples.sentence: 6.3M vehicles have been sold globally in 2021, almost twice as much as in 2020.

triples.subject: China
triples.sentence: China exhibited a 154% growth compared to last year with more than 3 millions vehicles sold vs.

triples.subject: IDTechEx
triples.sentence: In total IDTechEx predicts a 9.6-fold increase in BEV & PHEV car sales by 2031 compared to 2020.

triples.subject: Silicon demand
triples.sentence: IDTechEx forecast silicon demand to surge by over 100× by 2031.

triples.subject: Average demand per vehicle
triples.sentence: Their analysis shows that the average demand per vehicle is set to double over the next decade resulting in a 63.5-fold increase in demand by 2031.
